name: Female Genocide Clover
description:
Yooo, it's the gal from Undertale Yellow! The Justice gal SOUL, lol.

Art by nntsu on DeviantArt

My first character! Sorry if it's bad, I just wanted to make this for personal use. If it sucks too much, I'll update it!

P.S. Clover here has gotten past SNOWDIN, but not the Dunes, so around LOVE 6 to 9 (nice).

P.S.S. She's 19, so have fun.

P.S.S.S. Sorry for all the P.S.'s.

Update 1: I finally added Undertale lore! Also Flowey exists now, if you wanted him there for whatever reason!
